name: Isopropyl Cleaning Wipes (75 pack)
summary: 70% isopropyl wipes — the right way to clean your vaporiser.
description: 70% isopropyl alcohol wipes for keeping mouthpieces, screens and chambers clean. Use one between sessions on mouthpieces; deeper cleans every 10–15 sessions on chambers. Cleaner device = cleaner vapour = better dose.
